title: Beyond Your Thoughts Christmas Stockings, 20 inch Soft Velvet Large Xmas Stocking for Family Traditional Hanging Ornament Fireplace Christmas Decorations, Red Green White, 3 Pack
features: Material: Made of 100% good quality Ice velvet, decorate with sequin pattern and white soft faux fur
Proper Size: Length: 20", Width: 11", Opening: 8". Giving enough space to hold the whole family’s gifts, candies, chocolates, small toys, and other yuletide treats

Application: Each stocking has a sturdy hanging loop. The Christmas Stocking can be hanged on Christmas trees, fireplaces or anywhere in the house with the loop. The ample size won't limit Santa's generosity
Design: Unique designed, handmade in our studios. The sequin patterns are simple and timeless that can last a lifetime.An ideal for depicting the true nature of the season

Popular:Perfect Family Christmas Stockings for family parties, school parties, company parties and any other group parties! The Christmas theme design of this pet stocking will sure to enhance any type of holiday decorating theme.This will also be a great gift for your friends & family this Holiday Season
